title: Penalties
doc_html:
§2510. Penalties

            In the case of a violation of this Chapter, the commissioner may impose a penalty pursuant to R.S. 22:18.

            Acts 2020, No. 283, §1.
doc_text:
§2510.  Penalties
In the case of a violation of this Chapter, the commissioner may impose a penalty
pursuant to R.S. 22:18.
Acts 2020, No. 283, §1.
